hero.title: Screen Recorder
hero.tagline: Record your screen instantly — stays in your browser, private and free.

warnings.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support screen capture. Try Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on desktop.

whatIs.heading: What is this?
whatIs.body: A simple client-side screen recorder that saves recordings as WebM files in your browser.

howItWorks.step1: Click Start Recording and choose a screen, window, or tab.
howItWorks.step2: Stop Recording when finished; a preview and download link appear.
howItWorks.step3: Download the WebM file to your machine.
